text_block_list.text:
And so Daiwa Scarlet sets out on her<n>quest to
become the world's funnest<n>person to be
around.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All right, bring on the horrors! I'm<n>usually pretty
tough, but...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm not great with scary stuff, so you<n>should be
able to get a huge reaction<n>out of me! Kitasan,
Satono, Marvelous,<n>I'm counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We've got you covered, Scarlet! So<n>you want us
to scare you senseless,<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Okay, "senseless" is a bit much! Just<n>a small
spook, please. That's why I<n>asked you after all!
You're the most<n>innocent people I know!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Scary within reason. Roger that! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll go first. I'll make sure to start with<n>something
nice and easy.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Scarlet! Guess what? I'm actually a<n>ghost!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What? A ghost?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Oh, Kita. What kind of ghost<n>just comes
out and admits to being<n>one?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What?! Y-you're lying, right? I mean,<n>a real
ghost's tail would be all floaty<n>and translucent...
wouldn't it?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay, time to up the ante a little.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
See that, Scarlet? This shrine has a<n>protective
seal on it.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But looook, I'm gonna peel it off. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna what?! Wh-wha?!<n>Whoa, whoa. If
you do that...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's right. We might get cursed or<n>haunted.
Buuut...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's just superstition. We won't<n>know what'll
happen unless we try it!<n>One... two...
RRRRIP!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Just kidding! ♪ This is just some<n>paper I
brought with me. And even if<n>it's all just
superstition, it's not okay<n>to go ripping off seals.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Uh, Scarlet? You okay?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ah, ha, ha... Looks like that was a little<n>too
intense for her.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's it, I'm done! I need a break!<n>No one talk to
me! I'm going home!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But Marvelous hasn't even gone<n>yet...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's all right. I think we've done<n>more than
enough today...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Is this really the way home?<n>Nothing
around here looks familiar...
WHRRRR!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Where the heck are we?! This looks<n>like...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Somewhere... supernatural. Did we<n>wander into
the spirit realm or<n>something?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yay! All shall be marvelous! ★ Eyes<n>shimmering
in the night sky! Hands<n>sprouting from the earth!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Who am I? I am who? Zippity-zoopity,<n>marvelous!
☆ ♪ So, so,<n>MaARrRvVeLOUSsSssS! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: AAAAAAHHHH! Ah... Uh... Ngh...<n>Ughhh...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh no! Scarlet! Stay with us!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ahaha. She did say she wantedus to get a good reaction out of her.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And I think she's got the rest of us<n>beat in that
department. Looks like<n>she'll be just fine!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Marvelous! ☆

No one knows quite how Marvelous<n>Sunday
pulled the stunt off, but Daiwa<n>Scarlet returns to
the land of the living<n>with a newfound mastery of<n>
reactions.
